CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
TAF Claims — Pharmacy (Rx) Files
Version — December 2025
SAS name Label Type Length RX sequence New variables
Header claim file
BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary Identifier CHAR 15 1
